diagrams.title: Vector Projection in 2D
diagrams.description: Shows how vector u projects onto vector v, with projection length marked
elements: Projection of u onto v (along v)
Right angle indicator showing orthogonality of projection error
diagrams.purpose: Understand projection formula and component decomposition

diagrams.title: Orthogonal Vectors in Plane
diagrams.description: Two vectors u and v at right angles (90°) with zero dot product
diagrams.purpose: Visualize orthogonal/perpendicular vectors and their properties

diagrams.title: Gram-Schmidt Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step transformation of two linearly independent vectors to orthogonal set
elements: Second orthogonal vector v2 (perpendicular to v1)

diagrams.title: Triangle Inequality
elements: Side showing ||u|| + ||v|| (path via u to v)
Arc showing angle between u and v
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why direct path is shorter than indirect path
